senses.example: Can you secure me two tickets for the concert?
senses.example_zh: 你能为我弄到两张音乐会门票吗?

senses.def_en: to guard from danger or risk of loss
senses.example: Our missiles and bombers secure us from attack.
senses.example_zh: 我们的导弹和轰炸机保卫我们免遭攻击。

senses.example: She secured the boat with a rope.
senses.example_zh: 她用绳子把船拴住了。

derivatives: security n. 安全;抵押品;[pl.]证券

senses.example: Our medical insurance offers protection for the whole family in the event of illness.
senses.example_zh: 我们的医疗保险可为任何家庭成员在生病的情况下提供保障。

derivatives: protective a. 保护的;保护贸易的

senses.example: a shelter for the homeless
senses.example_zh: 无家可归者的收容所

senses.example: Food, clothing and shelter are all basic necessities of life.
senses.example_zh: 衣、食、住所是生活的基本必需品。

senses.example: Don't take shelter from the rain under a tree when there is thunder and lightning.
senses.example_zh: 有雷电时不要在树下避雨。

senses.def_en: to provide cover or protection for
senses.example: You can't shelter your brother from blame in the accident.
senses.example_zh: 你不可以庇护你的兄弟、使其免受事故的责难。

senses.example: It is reported that rats outnumber residents in New York by 9 to 1.
senses.example_zh: 据报道,纽约的老鼠的数量是其居民的 9 倍。

senses.example: the neurosurgery resident
senses.example_zh: 神经外科住院医师

senses.example: I've been resident in this hotel for five years.
senses.example_zh: 我住在这家旅馆 5 年了。

senses.example: resident doctor/student
senses.example_zh: 住院医生/住校学生

derivatives: residential a. 住宅的;与居住有关的

entries.mnemonic: re(back)+side(坐)→返回坐下,不再离开→定居

senses.def_en: to live in a place permanently or for an extended period
senses.example: He has resided abroad for many years.
senses.example_zh: 他在国外居住了多年。

senses.example: Memory has been shown to reside in some metals.
senses.example_zh: 已经证实,记忆存在于某些金属中。

senses.def_en: literary to live in a particular place
senses.example: We dwell in the country but work in the city.
senses.example_zh: 我们住在乡下,但在城里工作。

senses.example: monopoly enterprise
senses.example_zh: 垄断企业

senses.example: In many countries tobacco is a government monopoly.
senses.example_zh: 在许多国家,烟草是政府的垄断商品。

entries.mnemonic: mono(单个)+ton(声音)+ous→一个声音的→单调的

senses.def_en: tediously repetitious or lacking in variety
senses.example: He spoilt the poem by reading it in a monotonous voice.
senses.example_zh: 他单调的朗读糟蹋了这首诗。

senses.example: This is the shortest route from Boston to New York.
senses.example_zh: 这是从波士顿到纽约的最短路线。

senses.def_en: to sell in small quantities directly to consumers
senses.example: These shoes retail at $10.
senses.example_zh: 这些鞋

extras.title: 表示“居住”的动词
extras.content: reside:个人或一家人永久、固定、合法居住在某处。live:住在某处并从事自己的活动。dwell:与 reside, live 近义,但更常见于文学语言中。

extras.title: dwell
extras.content: dwell on/upon 老是想着,详述 Let bygones be bygones. Don't dwell on the past too much. 让过去的事情过去吧,不要沉湎于过去。
